svg:
<title id="title>Email Service Failure Modes <desc" id="desc">Email service failure modes: deliverability issues, bounce storms, template injection, and provider outages
<rect width="900" height="600" fill="#f8fafc/>
Email Service Failure Modes <text" x="450" y="58 text-anchor="middle" font-size="13 fill="#64748b">Deliverability issues, bounce storms, template injection, and provider outages
<text x="235 y="110" text-anchor="middle font-size="14" font-weight="bold fill="#ef4444">1. Deliverability Issues (Spam Folder)
<text x="120 y="175" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="white>Email Sent <text" x="120" y="190 text-anchor="middle" font-size="8 fill="#bfdbfe">Legitimate
<line x1="185 y1="180" x2="215 y2="180" stroke="#f59e0b" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow-orange)/> Filtered
<text x="285 y="175" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="white>Spam Folder <text" x="285" y="190 text-anchor="middle" font-size="8 fill="#fcd34d">Never seen
<text x="235 y="290" text-anchor="middle font-size="10" fill="#ef4444>Users never receive important emails! <text" x="235" y="310 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="#64748b">Cause: Poor reputation, missing auth, spammy content <text x="235 y="330" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="#10b981>Fix: SPF/DKIM/DMARC, warm IPs, monitor reputation
<rect" x="460" y="85 width="410" height="240" rx="8" fill="white" stroke="#f59e0b" stroke-width="2/> 2. Bounce Storm
<rect" x="480" y="135 width="370" height="140" rx="6" fill="#fffbeb" stroke="#fcd34d" stroke-width="1/>
<rect" x="490" y="150 width="120" height="60" rx="4" fill="#ef4444" stroke="#b91c1c" stroke-width="2/> <text" x="550" y="175 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="white">Bad Email List <text x="550 y="190" text-anchor="middle font-size="8" fill="#fca5a5>Invalid addresses
<text x="630 y="170" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="#ef4444>1000s of
<rect" x="655" y="150 width="120" height="60" rx="4" fill="#f59e0b" stroke="#b45309" stroke-width="1/> <text" x="715" y="175 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="white">Bounce Storm <text x="715 y="190" text-anchor="middle font-size="8" fill="#fcd34d>Overwhelms
<text x="795 y="170" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="#ef4444>Reputation
<rect" x="820" y="150 width="20" height="60" rx="2" fill="#ef4444" stroke="#b91c1c" stroke-width="2/> <text" x="830" y="180 text-anchor="middle" font-size="10 fill="white">!
<text x="665 y="290" text-anchor="middle font-size="10" fill="#ef4444>Sender reputation destroyed! <text" x="665" y="310 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="#64748b">Cause: Sending to invalid/stale lists <text x="665 y="330" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="#10b981>Fix: Validate addresses, clean lists, suppress hard bounces
<rect" x="30" y="340 width="410" height="240" rx="8" fill="white" stroke="#8b5cf6" stroke-width="2/> 3. Template Injection
<rect" x="50" y="380 width="370" height="140" rx="6" fill="#f5f3ff" stroke="#c4b5fd" stroke-width="1/>
<rect" x="60" y="395 width="140" height="60" rx="4" fill="#8b5cf6" stroke="#6d28d9" stroke-width="1/> <text" x="130" y="420 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="white">User Input <text x="130 y="435" text-anchor="middle font-size="8" fill="#c4b5fd>{{malicious}} <text" x="130" y="448 text-anchor="middle" font-size="7 fill="#c4b5fd">XSS payload
<line x1="205 y1="425" x2="235 y2="425" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow-red)/> Not escaped
<text x="315 y="420" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="white>Email Sent <text" x="315" y="435 text-anchor="middle" font-size="8 fill="#fca5a5">XSS executed <text x="315 y="448" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="#fca5a5>Recipients attacked
<text" x="235" y="495 text-anchor="middle" font-size="10 fill="#ef4444">Recipients receive malicious email! <text x="235 y="515" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="#64748b>Cause: Unescaped template variables <text" x="235" y="535 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="#10b981">Fix: Escape all user input, CSP headers, template sandbox
<text x="665 y="365" text-anchor="middle font-size="14" font-weight="bold fill="#10b981">4. Provider Outage
<text x="560 y="420" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="white>Single Provider <text" x="560" y="435 text-anchor="middle" font-size="8 fill="#6ee7b7">SendGrid/SES
<line x1="635 y1="425" x2="665 y2="425" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow-red)/> Outage!
<text x="745 y="420" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="white>Queue Backs Up <text" x="745" y="435 text-anchor="middle" font-size="8 fill="#fca5a5">Emails delayed
<text x="665 y="495" text-anchor="middle font-size="10" fill="#ef4444>Critical emails (password reset) delayed! <text" x="665" y="515 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="#64748b">Cause: Single provider dependency <text x="665 y="535" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="#10b981>Fix: Multi-provider failover, queue persistence
<marker" id="arrow" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9 refY="3.5" orient="auto> <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#64748b/>
<marker" id="arrow-red" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9 refY="3.5" orient="auto> <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#ef4444/>
<marker" id="arrow-orange" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9 refY="3.5" orient="auto>
